zh.lifeSummary: 當dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan於大約1100年出生在法國奧其坦尼時，她的父親Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer42歲，母親Save de Besancon37歲。她於大約1120年與Bernard DE COMMINGES在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1139年之後在法國奧其坦尼格斯。

zh-hans.Muret, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France: 法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛姆斯特

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan于大约1100年出生在法国奧其坦尼时，她的父亲Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer42岁，母亲Save de Besancon37岁。她于大约1120年与Bernard DE COMMINGES在法国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1139年之后在法国奧其坦尼格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Muret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Enrique, Mario, Adalberto, Alicia, Ana, Caridad, Eduardo, Esmeraldo, Juan, Lourdes.  French Armand, Magalie, Matilde.
Catalan: probably a variant of Coret, a nickname from coret, a diminutive of cor ‘heart’.
French: nickname from Old French curet ‘stick used to clean the plow’.

nameMeanings.name: dame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: from Middle English, Old French dame ‘lady’ (from Latin domina ‘mistress’), applied as a nickname for a foppish young man whose outfit and manner have an effeminate elegance, or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a lady. As a French name it may also be a nickname meaning ‘mother-in-law’.
English: possibly an East Anglian variant of   Dam   4.

variants.name: Dam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Hoa, Tuan, Ngoc, Thanh, Binh, Chanh, Duc, Hiep, Minh, Nu, Tien.  Southeast Asian Hong, Chan, Dong, Hon, Man, Oi, Ok, Phoung, Sang, Sokhom, Sun.
Vietnamese (Đàm): from the Chinese surnames 譚, 谈 and 覃, see Tan 1-3.
Cambodian: written ដាំ, possibly of Vietnamese origin (see above). The surname ដាំ also corresponds to the Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘to plant’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Samatan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Kamel, Mousa, Nader, Adnan, Asaad, Ashraf, Ayoub, Azmi, Bahjat, Chawki, Ehsan, Fadel.
Arabic (Levant and Egypt): most likely a variant of   Samman   ‘butter-merchant’. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare   Semaan  .

variants.name: Samman
meanings: Arabic (mainly Syria): occupational name from sammān ‘butter-merchant’, from samn ‘butter’. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Samaan and Saman 1.
Americanized form of North German   Sammann  .
English: variant of   Salmon  .

variants.name: Semaan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Rami, Aiman, Akram, Amal, Assaf, Aziz, Emad, Fadi, Fadia, Fady, Gihan, Khalil.
Arabic (Lebanon and Syria): variant of   Samaan  , itself most likely a variant of   Samman   ‘butter-merchant’. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians.

nameMeanings.name: Diaz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Meadows, gardens’; in some countries denoting meadows where horses were broken in.

en.lifeSummary: When dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan was born about 1100, in Occitanie, France, her father, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, was 42 and her mother, Save de Besancon, was 37. She married Bernard DE COMMINGES about 1120, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1139, in Gers, Occitanie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan est née environ 1100, à Occitanie, France, son père, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Save de Besancon, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard DE COMMINGES environ 1120, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1139, à Gers, Occitanie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan um 1100 in Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer 42 und ihre Mutter Save de Besancon 37. Sie hat um 1120 in Frankreich Bernard DE COMMINGES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1139 in Gers, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan è nata il circa 1100 nel Occitanie, Francia, sua padre, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Save de Besancon, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Bernard DE COMMINGES circa 1120, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1139, nel Gers, Occitanie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatanが約1100年にフランスオクシタニーで生まれた時，父Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyerは42歳，母Save de Besanconは37歳であった。約1120年にフランスでBernard DE COMMINGESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1139年以後にフランスオクシタニージャーズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan(이)가 대략 1100년 프랑스 옥시탠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Save de Besancon(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1120년 프랑스에서 Bernard DE COMMINGES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 이후 프랑스 옥시탠이 그르스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Occitanie, França, seu pai, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Save de Besancon, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard DE COMMINGES aproximadamente 1120, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1139, em Gers, Occitanie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan родилась около 1100 г. в местности окситани, Франция, её отцу по имени Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Save de Besancon, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard DE COMMINGES около 1120 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1139 г. в местности джирс, окситани, Франция.

sm.environ 1100–après 1139: e tusa o le 1100–ina ua ma'ea le 1139

es.lifeSummary: Cuando dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan nació aproximadamente 1100, en Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Godefroy Raymond de Muret Seigneur de Muret et de Samatan, Ecuyer, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Save de Besancon, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Bernard DE COMMINGES aproximadamente 1120, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1139, en Gers, Occitanie, Francia.
